update_dislikes:
Millions of regular players spend their time every day enjoying BGMI, and many of us also spend a lot of money on the game. But what are normal players getting in return? Why are these server issues, lag, and FPS drop problems still not fixed even after the last two updates?

It feels like you don't think about the everyday players anymore. You organize esports events very well, but it seems like the money spent by regular players is only benefiting esports, while normal players continue to struggle with poor game performance.

Many of us are extremely frustrated. We are being forced to consider uninstalling the game because these problems have not been resolved by your team. I know I'm not the son of a minister, so my single email may not make any difference. At best, I might only receive an assurance in return, but that won't make the game run smoothly.

Maybe I'm the biggest fool for continuing to spend money on crates and purchasing the Royale Pass in a game that still has these serious performance issues.

I sincerely hope you will listen to the concerns of your regular players and make the game smoother and more stable as soon as possible.

update_dislikes:
I don't particularly dislike the updates themselves, as they often introduce new content and features that keep the game fresh. However, what disappoints me is that with every update, many players hope that long-standing issues such as server errors and ping spikes will finally be resolved.

Unfortunately, these problems have continued to persist despite multiple updates. As a result, it becomes frustrating for players who want to enjoy a smooth and competitive gaming experience. Addressing server stability and network performance would have a much greater positive impact on the community than introducing new content alone.

Subject: High Ping Issue in Every Match

Hello BGMI Team,

I'm facing a serious high ping issue in every match. It happens in Classic, Ranked, and Scrims, and on all maps. The ping suddenly becomes unstable, causing severe lag, delayed movement, and delayed hit registration, which makes competitive matches very difficult to play.

My internet connection is stable, but this issue keeps happening only in BGMI. Please investigate and fix this problem as soon as possible.

Thank you.
